caption:
Comment "CODING" to get Free and Opensource Alternative to Claude Code called OpenCode.

Discover OpenCode. It's a free and open-source pick instead of Claude Code. You can vibecode full-stack apps. No limits. No paywalls.

Think of it like this. Paid tools cut you off mid-project. OpenCode? It keeps going. I tried it last week. Asked it to build a simple SaaS dashboard. Done in minutes. No hassle.

You get top coding models. From Kimi. MiniMax. GLM. Even some unreleased ones from big AI companies. Free limits are plenty big. Like having an endless candy jar. No rationing.

Features match what you need. Commands for quick tasks. MCP servers to host stuff. Skills you can tweak. Subagents that split the work. All there. Ready to use.

Getting started takes seconds. Two ways. Download the app from their site. Or run one command in your terminal.

Hit enter. You're in. Built a todo app right away. Felt smooth.

Why does this fit you? Because anytime you want to test AI for apps or automations, chances are you'll:

 1. skip paid subs
 2. build faster with free models
 3. share tips on YouTube

It's like Claude Code without the bill. Perfect for no-code vibes. Or Python scripts. Even client SaaS projects.

The good news? You control it all. No waiting for credits. Just code.

Try it now. Pick a small project. Watch it flow.

#claudecode #opencode #opensourceai #aicoding #opensourceai
hook: Comment "CODING" to get Free and Opensource Alternative to Claude Code called OpenCode.
angle: Positioning OpenCode as unlimited, free coding tool without paywalls or credit limits

caption:
Comment "BUILD" to get access to Replit that can build full apps and websites in minutes.

You don't need to hire a developer. Or blow your budget on no-code tools. To build a full app anymore. Replit's AI Agent does it all for you. It turns your ideas into live software. In minutes.

I tried it last week. Told it: "Make a simple task tracker for my team." Plain words. No code from me.

Describe your app in plain English. Watch it work. No skills needed. It builds the frontend. The backend too. Databases. Logins. Payments. All of it.

Like this. Say, "Build me a project management tool." Add team logins. Kanban boards. Real-time alerts. Stripe billing. The Agent plans it out. Writes clean code. React up front. Node.js in back. Postgres for data.

It tests like a pro. Spins up a browser. Clicks pages. Fills forms. Checks flows. Finds a bug? Fixes it. Retests. Done.

Need changes? Just chat. "Add dark mode." Or "Sync with Google Calendar." It updates fast.

Hit deploy. Your app lives. With hosting. Custom domains. Autoscaling. Free for starters. Scales cheap later.

Here's why teams love it:
 1. Ship ideas fast. No waiting.
 2. Edit code yourself. Tweak anytime.
 3. Test real-world. Like a human user.

Creating an app feels easy now. Like dictating a note to your phone. But way bigger.

The good news? If you've got an idea sitting idle. Replit handles the rest. I built my tracker in 20 minutes.

#aicoding #vibecoding #replit #websitebuilder #aibuilder
hook: Comment "BUILD" to get access to Replit that can build full apps and websites in minutes.
angle: No-code solution enabling non-developers to build production apps in minutes using AI agents

caption:
Comment “BUILD” to get the Manychat DM Automation Template I use that helped me gain 400k followers in just under 12 months.

I've gained over 400K followers in the last 12 months. And one tool did most of that work. It's called Manychat.

Think about it. You post a Reel or carousel on Instagram. Comments roll in fast. Without Manychat? You'd chase each one with manual DMs. But with it? Everything runs on auto.

I recently set it up for a post about lead magnets. Someone typed "TEMPLATE." They got my Notion file right away. No effort from me.

Here's the deal. You build keyword flows. Takes five minutes. Someone comments "TEMPLATE"? They get a DM with your file. "GUIDE"? Full PDF hits their inbox. "LINK"? Straight to your page. I use this on every post.

Why does it work so well? Like a robot butler. Handles replies 24/7. No flags. Meta approves it fully. I started with one post. Now? Every single one. Followers keep coming.

The good news? Setup is quick. Runs forever. I added thousands to my list this way. People love the instant help.

Results hit hard. More DMs. Better engagement. Casual fans turn into buyers.

Tired of missed leads? This fixes that.

#manychatpartner #Manychat #aiautomations #nicksaraev
hook: Comment "BUILD" to get the Manychat DM Automation Template I use that helped me gain 400k followers in just under 12 months.
topic: Manychat DM automation for follower growth
